root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code, sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate,'DD/MM/YYYY') as sysdate_tdate, ( case loan_group_code when '01' then 'ฉุกเฉิน' when '02' then 'สามัญ' else 'พิเศษ' end ) as group_code_name
,( select count(sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no) from sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_mem_m_membership_registered where (sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) and (sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock <> 0) ) as count_mem_share_normal
,( select sum(sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock) from sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_mem_m_membership_registered where (sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) ) as sum_share_stock
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_lon_m_contract WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.contact_status <> '1' ) /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type
